post.description: Sends a generic 6-digit OTP to the email if it exists.
Authenticate using Email or Phone + Password.

200.description: Login successful. Returns User object and sets 'session_token' cookie.

post.description: Clears the session cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently logged-in user's details based on the session cookie.

post.description: Sends an OTP to the registered email for passwordless login.
Initiates registration by sending an OTP. **IMPORTANT:** Currently, OTPs are sent ONLY via Email.  Do not expect SMS even if phone number is collected later.

email.description: The user's email address (OTP will be sent here)

400.description: Invalid input OR referrer's invite slots are full (reason - HEAVEN1_COMPLETE or SLOTS_FULL)

409.description: Account already exists with this phone/email

post.description: Resets the user's password using the verified OTP.

otp.description: The valid OTP is required again for security

400.description: Validation error

post.description: Finalize registration by setting the password using the verification token from Step 2.

password.description: New password (min 8 chars, 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 number, 1 special)

200.description: Account created and logged in successfully

400.description: Password requirements not met

post.description: Verify the code sent to the user's email.

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP

post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the email during password recovery.

400.description: Invalid OTP

get.description: Retrieves the current user's cart with details (images, variants, stock).

post.description: Adds a product (and optional variant) to the cart.

200.description: Item added successfully and returns updated cart

400.description: Stock limit exceeded or invalid quantity

post.description:
Validates a list of product IDs to check if they still exist, 
are not archived, and are in stock. Use this before checkout 
to ensure all cart items are still available for purchase.

**Use Case:** Mobile app should call this on Cart Screen load and before checkout.

productIds.description: Array of product IDs to validate

validItems.description: Product IDs that are valid and available

400.description: Invalid request (missing or invalid productIds array)

get.description: Returns top-level collections (e.g. Gift Sets, Perfumes)
Fetch dynamic content like Home Banners or About Us text.

post.description: Validates a coupon code and calculates the discount amount. If user is logged in, also checks if coupon was already used by this customer (one-time use per user).

400.description: Invalid request, coupon inactive, or minimum amount not met

level.description: The Heaven level to claim reward for (1, 3, 5, 7)

400.description: Invalid level

get.description: Returns a recursive tree structure for D3.js or React Flow visualization. **Structure:** Node -> Children[] -> Children[] (up to 7 levels deep).

parameters.name: targetUserId
parameters.description: (Admin Only) View a specific user's galaxy.

get.description: Returns the user's MLM dashboard data, including level progress (1-7), total team size,  and direct referral list.
Fetch last 50 notifications for the user.

400.description: Invalid request

post.description: Cancels an active order if it is not yet delivered/shipped.

400.description: Order cannot be cancelled (e.g. already delivered)

get.description: Returns a list of past orders for the logged-in user.

post.description: Creates a new order. This is the **Checkout** endpoint.

mlmOptIn.description: If true, user becomes a 7th Heaven Member

referrerCode.description: Optional referral code from existing 7th Heaven member

couponCode.description: Coupon code to apply (one-time use per customer)

200.description: Order placed successfully. If mlmSkipped is true, invite code was valid but referrer's slots were full — order still succeeds.

mlmSkipped.description: Present and true if MLM opt-in was skipped due to full slots

mlmSkipReason.description: Human-readable reason why MLM opt-in was skipped

400.description: Coupon already used, invalid items, or out of stock

post.description: Track an order using Order ID. Phone or Email is optional if the user is logged in.

400.description: Verification details required (if not logged in) or invalid request

post.description: Handles the server-to-server callback from PayU after a transaction. Verifies the hash and completes the order.

303.description: Redirects to the payment status page

400.description: Invalid hash or missing data

post.description: Generates a secure hash and transaction ID for PayU.  Returns the parameters required to submit the PayU form from the client side.

actionUrl.description: The PayU URL to submit the form to (Test/Live)

400.description: Bad Request (Missing Order ID or Incomplete User Profile)

get.description: Retrieves the current status of a payment transaction and order details.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The transaction ID from payment gateway

isGuest.description: True if user has no password set (guest checkout)

post.summary: Submit a review for a product

400.description: Invalid input or already reviewed
Invalid input

get.description: Returns products tagged as "For 7th Heaven" by admin. Only products with `isFor7thHeaven: true`, in stock, and not archived are returned. Additionally filtered by price <= admin-configured limit (default: ₹4000).

maxPriceLimit.description: The current price cap set by admin

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products. Supports filtering by collection (e.g., Gift Sets), category (e.g., For Him), gender, and price.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for product name or description

parameters.name: collectionSlug
parameters.description: Filter by Parent Collection Slug (e.g., 'gift-sets'). Use this for the main listing page.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by Category Slug (e.g., 'for-him') or ID. Can be comma-separated.

get.description: Fetch detailed product info including variants and related products via URL slug.
Returns detailed profile info including address and referral code.

post.description: Request OTP to verify EMAIL change. (Phone updates do not happen here anymore).

type.description: Only 'email' is supported for OTP requests now.

400.description: Email already in use or invalid parameters

put.description: Update profile details.  **Note:** Changing Email requires `otp` and `email`.  Changing Phone does NOT require OTP anymore. Changing Password requires `currentPassword`.

400.description: OTP required/invalid or Email/Phone already in use

post.description: Validates a referral code by checking if it belongs to an active 7th Heaven member.

200.description: Invite code is valid and slots are available

400.description: Code is valid but slots are full (HEAVEN1_COMPLETE or SLOTS_FULL)
Already in wishlist

post.description: Receives order status updates and AWB tracking info from Shipquickr

400.description: Missing required fields
